title: uva-ursi pringlei
intro: Uva-ursi pringlei, also known as bearberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to North America, specifically the western region. The plant contains arbutin, a glycoside with antimicrobial and astringent properties, which makes it a popular herbal remedy for urinary tract infections and other conditions. The medicinal properties of uva-ursi pringlei help to reduce inflammation, fight off bacteria, and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as cystitis and incontinence. Uva-ursi pringlei can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote urinary health and prevent infections.
